steps.title: Identify what the claim requires
steps.content: The claim says Toomer uses figurative language to connect urban DC with the rural South. The right quotation must do both: be figurative and link the two settings.

steps.title: Match to the choice
steps.content:
(C) uses a simile ("falls like a fertile shower") and explicitly connects the rural South ("soil of my homeland") with urban DC ("lean streets of [Washington, DC]"). It hits both parts.

(A), (B), and (D) describe the urban setting but don't link it figuratively to the rural South.

That matches choice C — C is correct.
